Tropical Storm ETA delivered 8" of water in my adorable beach home in Madeira Beach. It was the combo of the moon and tides. Once you get water in your home, you have no idea the devastation is causes on your mind and soul. All I can say is if you are in a flood zone where there is a threat... learn how to protect your doorways with sandbags and plastic. There is a right way and a wrong way. (google it!) I ended up selling my home after many months of restoring it. There is no better place to live than in Pinellas County! Stay prepared and protect yourself from the water.. It is the worst!
